news.paragraph: The broader market is navigating conflicting signals as strength in chip stocks provides support while signs of resurgent inflation exert downward pressure. Traders should also monitor geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and potential volatility stemming from an upcoming US-China meeting. These mixed macroeconomic and geopolitical factors create a complex environment for near-term price action.
headlines: Exchange-Traded Funds, Equity Futures Mixed Pre-Bell Wednesday Ahead of US-China Meeting
Chip Stock Strength Lifts the Broader Market
